reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Good spot, closes at 10 PM. You can sleep with a motorhome there, and it has a power outlet and a clean bathroom. There's no shower or a place to fill up with drinking water. The Wi-Fi works well.

(Original)
Bom posto, fecha às 22h . Pode dormir com motorhome e possui ponto de tomada e banheiro limpo. Não tem ducha, nem ponto para encher água potável. O Wi-Fi funciona bem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPczhTa1NREAE

reviews.comment:
Soy Belisario Saravia y familia , quiero destacar la atención y limpieza del luga, en especial los baños.
Asimismo la excelente disposición de Samuel, oriundo de Salta, Campo Quijano, para atendernos y solucionar nuestras inquietudes.
Deberían tener un servicio de cafetería y algún tipo de maxiquiosco.
Me encanta Hualfin!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I'm Belisario Saravia and my family, and I want to highlight the excellent service and cleanliness of the place, especially the restrooms.
Also, Samuel, originally from Campo Quijano, Salta, was incredibly helpful and answered all our questions.
They should definitely add a coffee shop and some kind of convenience store. I love Hualfin!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPOXJmUGRBEAE
